languages.text: "Суть! Все три объекта эксперимента были обнаружены в критическом состоянии. Я задался вопросом — действительно ли их польза и эффективность в служении исчерпаны? Абсурд. Переход из состояния бытия в состояние небытия не несет в себе каких-либо благ или смысла. Я лично распорядился о консервации их жизненных функций. Наше цель проще некуда — одолеть смерть, сотворив идеального праведника, нечто, что я называю Триасоматой".

"The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."
languages.original_text: "Суть! Все три объекта эксперимента были обнаружены в критическом состоянии. Я задался вопросом — действительно ли их польза и эффективность в служении исчерпаны? Абсурд. Переход из состояния бытия в состояние небытия не несет в себе каких-либо благ или смысла. Я лично распорядился о консервации их жизненных функций. Наше цель проще некуда — одолеть смерть, сотворив идеального праведника, нечто, что я называю Триасоматой".

To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

languages.text: 「命の危機に瀕していた。彼らの有用性と生産性は本当に終わりか？ 嘘だ。存在から非存在への移行には意味がない。私は彼らに命の維持を保証した。我々の目標はシンプルだ。完璧な正義の人間、トライアスモータを創造し、死を打ち破る」
languages.original_text: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Hogwash. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, the Triasomata."

traits.locale_text: 「命の危機に瀕していた。彼らの有用性と生産性は本当に終わりか？ 嘘だ。存在から非存在への移行には意味がない。私は彼らに命の維持を保証した。我々の目標はシンプルだ。完璧な正義の人間、トライアスオマタを創造し、死を打ち破る。」

languages.text: “这就是关键所在！这三个有机体被发现时皆处于危急状态。于是我扪心自问：他们的效用与生产能力真的已经走到尽头了吗？当然不是。从存在状态转变为非存在状态，毫无益处与意义可言。我亲手确保了他们生命机能的延续。我们的目标再简单不过：创造我称之为三相体的完美的正义之人，从而战胜死亡。”
languages.original_text: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

traits.locale_text: “这就是关键所在！这三个有机体被发现时皆处于危急状态。于是我扪心自问：他们的效用与生产能力真的已经走到尽头了吗？当然不是。从存在状态转变为非存在状态，毫无益处与意义可言。我亲手确保了他们生命机能的延续。我们的目标再简单不过：创造我称之为三相体的完美的正义之人，从而战胜死亡。”

languages.text: «¡El quid de la cuestión! Los tres organismos se encontraban en estado crítico. Me pregunté: ¿de verdad es este el fin de su utilidad y su capacidad productiva? Tonterías. Pasar de la existencia a la no existencia no presenta beneficios ni significado. Me aseguré personalmente de que se conservaran sus funciones vitales. Nuestro objetivo no puede ser más sencillo: derrotar a la muerte creando al hombre perfectamente virtuoso, que he designado el triasómata».
languages.original_text: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

traits.locale_text: «¡El quid de la cuestión! Los tres organismos se encontraban en estado crítico. Me pregunté: ¿de verdad es este el fin de su utilidad y su capacidad productiva? Tonterías. Pasar de la existencia a la no existencia no presenta beneficios ni significado. Me aseguré personalmente de que se conservaran sus funciones vitales. Nuestro objetivo no puede ser más sencillo: derrotar a la muerte creando al hombre perfectamente virtuoso, que he designado el triasómata».

languages.text: "Aber ... Alle drei Organismen befanden sich in einem kritischen Zustand. Also fragte ich mich, ist ihr Nutzen und ihre Produktionskapazität tatsächlich erschöpft? Unsinn. Zum Zustand des Seins, in einen Zustand des Nicht-Seins zu wechseln, birgt keinerlei Vorteile oder Bedeutung. Ich habe persönlich für den Erhalt ihrer Vitalfunktionen gesorgt. Unser Ziel könnte einfacher nicht sein ... wir besiegen den Tod durch die Schaffung des absolut rechtschaffenen Menschen ... den ich als Triosomata bezeichne."
languages.original_text: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

traits.locale_text: "Aber ... Alle drei Organismen befanden sich in einem kritischen Zustand. Also fragte ich mich, ist ihr Nutzen und ihre Produktionskapazität tatsächlich erschöpft? Unsinn. Zum Zustand des Seins, in einen Zustand des Nicht-Seins zu wechseln, birgt keinerlei Vorteile oder Bedeutung. Ich habe persönlich für den Erhalt ihrer Vitalfunktionen gesorgt. Unser Ziel könnte einfacher nicht sein ... wir besiegen den Tod durch die Schaffung des absolut rechtschaffenen Menschen ... den ich als Triosomata bezeichne."

languages.text: « Venons-en à l'essentiel ! Ces trois organismes ont été trouvés en état critique, ce qui m'a amené à me poser cette question : est-ce réellement la fin de leur utilité et de leur capacité productive ? Bien au contraire ! Il n'y a aucun avantage ni aucun sens à passer d'un état de vie à un état de non-vie. J'ai donc personnellement veillé à préserver leurs fonctions vitales. Notre objectif est des plus simples : nous cherchons à triompher de la mort en créant l'homme parfaitement vertueux, que j'ai dénommé le Triasomata. »
languages.original_text: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."

languages.text: "İşin püf noktası! Üç organizma da kritik durumda bulundu. Kendi kendime sordum: Faydaları ve üretkenlik kapasiteleri gerçekten sona ermiş miydi? Saçmalık. Varoluş durumundan yokluk durumuna geçmek, hiçbir fayda veya anlam taşımaz. Hayati işlevlerinin korunmasını bizzat ben sağladım. Amacımız daha basit olamazdı. Mükemmel doğru insanı, Üçyeköz adını verdiğim şeyi yaratarak ölümü yenmek."
languages.original_text: "The crux! All three organisms were found in critical condition. I asked myself: is their usefulness and productive capacity truly at an end? Nonsense. To move from a state of being to a state of non-being entails no benefits or meaning. I personally ensured that their vital functions were preserved. Our goal could not be simpler — to vanquish death by creating the perfect righteous man, that which I have dubbed the Triasomata."
